mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DcChannelMessages (channelId, channelName, timestamp, user, content, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (#{channelId}, #{channelName}, #{timestamp}, #{user}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, channelId, channelName, timestamp, user, content, createdAt, updatedAt FROM DcChannelMessages WHERE channelId = #{channelId} ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT DISTINCT channelId FROM DcChannelMessages ORDER BY channelId ASC
